metadata.methodology: Installed capacity is total operational solar PV capacity registered with DESNZ in GW (AC). Generation percentage is solar as a share of total UK electricity generated in the calendar year. Summer peak generation days can see solar meet over 30% of demand; the annual average is far lower due to UK seasonal daylight hours and cloud cover.
knownIssues: Installed capacity includes domestic, commercial, and utility-scale installations — the mix has shifted significantly toward ground-mounted utility scale since 2016.
Generation percentage varies significantly by year depending on weather; 2023 was particularly cloudy, suppressing the annual figure.
Embedded (behind-the-meter) solar generation is estimated, not directly metered, introducing uncertainty into generation statistics.
